query: extreme harsh chiaroscuro single light source dramatic black abstract shadow
message: anti_aesthetics/lighting: extreme chiaroscuro — single-source dramatic, abstract black/shadow play, deep contrast pushed to graphic abstraction

response.objective_caption: A high-contrast black-and-white photograph of numerous small, bright circular dots arranged in long, converging rows across a dark surface. The pattern recedes from the lower portion of the frame toward the upper edge, where a large, pale circular form sits against a solid black background. The composition emphasizes geometric repetition, strong linear perspective, and the rhythmic alignment of the illuminated elements.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A high-contrast black-and-white photograph of numerous small, bright circular dots arranged in long, converging rows across a dark surface, captured with extremely shallow depth of field that leaves the foreground and background softly blurred while a narrow middle band remains in sharper focus. The pattern recedes toward a large, pale circular form at the top against a black background, with the selective focus creating a dreamlike, atmospheric quality across the geometric composition.
